name: Black Bean Tortilla Melts
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz.) black beans, rinsed and drained
2 cans (4 oz.) chopped green chiles, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the black beans.
2. Add chili powder and stir well.
3. Spread about 3 tablespoons of bean mixture on each tortilla.
4. Sprinkle with fresh cilantro and squeeze one lime wedge over each tortilla.
5. Top each tortilla with 2 tablespoons green chiles and 2 tablespoons cheese.
6. Bake the tortillas at 450°F for 3 to 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
7. Serve with fresh salsa.
